text:
The Bull Market is a low-end tag auction market in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 85 

Overview

The Bull Market acts like a silent auction, with some characteristics of a garage sale and a flea market bazaar. 

A bidder has to write the amounts they are willing to pay on the tags attached to the auction items. Whoever writes down the highest bid within the time limit wins, but vendors will often sell before the time is up if they can reach an agreement with the buyers on the price. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Returning to their hotel after purchasing a Southernpiece Auction catalog, Gon, Killua, and Leorio pass through the Bull Market. After Leorio explains how items are sold, a knife catches Gon's attention and he uses Gyo to examine it, noticing the residual aura emanating from it. Recognizing it as a Ben's knife which is worth at least 5 million, Killua asks Leorio to bargain for the item. Gon and Killua eventually realize that they can use Gyo to find valuable items made by geniuses. 

Trivia

The name of the place, Bull Market, is not spoken in the manga or in the anime adaptations. The name only appears above one of the stalls in the manga. 

Anime and Manga Differences

In the manga, small plush dolls of Yoshihiro Togashi (self represented as a dog with glasses), his wife Naoko Takeuchi (represented as a bunny), and Hiei from YuYu Hakusho can be seen on a stall in the Bull Market. In the 2011 anime adaptation, only Takeuchi's bunny doll appears. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 48 (2011) The 1999 anime adaptation shows none of the mentioned Easter eggs. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 57 (1999) 

Intertextuality and References

In the financial sector, "bull market" is an expression to indicate the primary market trend of a period of generally rising prices.
